html:
A Gold Nugget is a mineral in Don't Starve. It is a required item for many Crafting recipes.

Gold Nuggets can be found by mining Boulders (with gold veins on their side) or Stalagmites (found only in Caves). They can be found lying on the ground in Graveyards or Rocky biomes, and fall from the ceiling in Caves during Earthquakes. The Pig King will also exchange Gold Nuggets for certain items. They can be crafted by Wilson using Nitre if he has the "Transmute Ore II" skill unlocked. As some of the aforementioned items exchangeable for Gold Nuggets are renewable, this makes it a fully-renewable resource.

Like most other minerals, Gold Nuggets can be eaten by Slurtles and Snurtles, and Slurtles will attack a player carrying it if there aren't any other minerals in the immediate area.

Trivia

  • Gold Nuggets, similarily to gold in real life and unlike Gold Nuggets in its Singleplayer DLCs, sink in water in Don't Starve Together.

Gallery

  • Glittering Gold Nugget.
  • Pig King throwing a Gold Nugget.
  • Gold Nuggets in a Graveyard.
  • Gold nuggets while the player is low on sanity.
  • There is no limit to the amount of gold that the Pig King can give.
  • Original HD icon from Bonus Materials from CD Don't Starve.

"goldnugget"
“I can't eat it, but it sure is shiny.”
–Wilson
“What should we spend it on??”
–Willow
“Money is for tiny men!”
–Wolfgang
“Even in purgatory it remains the most precious of metals.”
–Wendy
“I APPRECIATE ITS CONDUCTIVITY”
–WX-78
“A small lump of gold. Atomic number 79.”
–Wickerbottom
“You can't make a coffee table out of gold.
Well, maybe you can. But you shouldn't.”
–Woodie
“This was important to me once.”
–Maxwell
“Such a pleasing göld piece.”
–Wigfrid
“We definitely like shiny.”
–Webber
“Yolk yellow, glowing gold!”
–Warly
“Little Yellow Stone”
–Wormwood
“Gold! What a prospect.”
–Winona
“Money is soulless.”
–Wortox
“Shiny from the ground!”
–Wurt
“Ow... I bit it, isn't that a thing people do?”
–Walter
“Hmm... would a solid gold pocket watch be too much?”
–Wanda
A Gold Nugget is a mineral in Don't Starve. It is a required item for many Crafting recipes.
Gold Nuggets can be found by mining Boulders (with gold veins on their side) or Stalagmites (found only in Caves). They can be found lying on the ground in Graveyards or Rocky biomes, and fall from the ceiling in Caves during Earthquakes. The Pig King will also exchange Gold Nuggets for certain items. They can be crafted by Wilson using Nitre if he has the "Transmute Ore II" skill unlocked. As some of the aforementioned items exchangeable for Gold Nuggets are renewable, this makes it a fully-renewable resource.
Like most other minerals, Gold Nuggets can be eaten by Slurtles and Snurtles, and Slurtles will attack a player carrying it if there aren't any other minerals in the immediate area.

Tóm tắt

Thỏi Vàng là một loại khoáng sản trong Don't Starve. Nó là một vật phẩm cần thiết cho nhiều công thức Chế tạo.
